series_metadata.series_description: Fiscal Service Division SOP’s mirror ODJFS’ Internal Policy and Procedures and are used as an internal instructional tool for staff. The procedures include, but are not limited to, guidance on internal performance review processes, signature authority, telephone usage, the process for requesting leave and call off notification, payment card usage, building orientation and other administrative processes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office untilsuperseded by an updatedpolicy ; Electronic: in office untilsuperseded by an updatedpolicy
